<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create Item"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/{organisation}/{event}/items"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new item and stores it for the given event.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"organisation","in":"path","description":"Organisation slug","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"organisation"}},{"name":"event","in":"path","description":"Event slug or ID","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"event"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"List of Item ksuids","required":false,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["items"],"properties":{"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"ksuid":{"type":"string"},"name":{"type":"string"},"description":{"type":"string"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["draft","live","archived","outdated"]},"column":{"description":"??","type":"number"},"row":{"description":"??","type":"number"},"primary_price":{"description":"Primary price of the item in pennies","type":"number"},"secondary_price":{"description":"Secondary price of the item in pennies","type":"number"},"tertiary_price":{"description":"Tertiary price of the item in pennies","type":"number"},"primary_price_name":{"description":"Name of primary price","type":"string"},"secondary_price_name":{"description":"Name of secondary price","type":"string"},"tertiary_price_name":{"description":"Name of tertiary price","type":"string"},"individually_purchaseable":{"description":"Would you like people to purchase this on it's own","type":"boolean"},"stripe_price_id":{"description":"Whats the related stripe price_id","type":"string"},"stripe_primary_price_id":{"description":"Whats the related stripe price_id for the primary price","type":"string"},"stripe_secondary_price_id":{"description":"Whats the related stripe price_id for the secondary price","type":"string"},"stripe_tertiary_price_id":{"description":"Whats the related stripe price_id for the tertiary price","type":"string"},"stripe_product_id":{"description":"Whats the related stripe product_id","type":"string"},"entity_type":{"type":"string"},"pricing_schedule":{"type":"object","properties":{"something":{"type":"string"}},"x-internal-group":"items","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"PriceScheduleObject"}},"x-internal-group":"items","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"ItemObject"}}},"x-internal-group":"items","x-internal-path":"_pydantic/models","title":"CreateItemRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
